message:
fix(connector): cap replay candidates, guard non-finite scores, and add frozen-publisher protection

control_evidence_replay.rs:
- Cap candidates vector at MAX_CANDIDATES (4096) via push_bounded()
  to prevent unbounded memory growth during replay
- Guard raw score calculation against NaN/Inf, returning 0.0 for
  non-finite values

ecosystem_reputation.rs:
- Add PublisherFrozen error variant; update_score() now rejects
  updates to frozen publishers with a descriptive error
- is_anomalous_delta() fails closed (returns true) when
  std_dev_multiplier is non-finite or negative, preventing
  misconfiguration from silently disabling anomaly detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
